lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What did God tell Jonah to do?
answers: Go to Nineveh and tell them to turn from their sin
Write a story about a whale
He sailed in the opposite direction

questions.text: What happened while Jonah was on the ship?
What did the sailors think was causing the storm?
answers: A god was punishing someone for sin

questions.text: What did Jonah tell the sailors to do?
answers: Jump into the sea with him

questions.text: What happened to Jonah after he was thrown into the sea?
answers: A great fish swallowed him for three days
He was stung by a jellyfish
He rode on the back by a dolphin

questions.text: What did Jonah do inside the fish?
What did God command the fish to do?
What message did Jonah give to Nineveh?
answers: In 40 days, the city will be destroyed
God is very pleased with you
In 40 days, our army will attack you

questions.text: What did the people of Nineveh do?
answers: They repented, and God did not destroy the city
They chased Jonah out of the city
They threw Jonah back into the sea
